title: Recipe
content:
CHIDDEN still murmurs,
    SLAPPED and RAPPED complain,
    HURT, with a thousand tongues,
    Whines out his pain.

    This is the learning
    Unto which we come:
    PROPERLY WALLOPED
    Is for ever dumb.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas William Hodgson Crosland delivers a powerful performance in "Recipe"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
